"[22] SIGALERT UPDATE IN LOS ANGELES: NB I-5 AT I-10, THE #2, #3, AND #4 LANES WILL BE CLOSED. THE WB I-10 TRANSITION TO THE NB I-5 IS CLOSED. THE I-10 EXPRESS LANES BETWEEN ALAMEDA STREET AND THE I-710 WILL BE CLOSED FOR AN ADDITIONAL TWO HOURS DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION."

"[21] SIGALERT UPDATE IN LOS ANGELES: NB I-5 AT I-10, THE #2/3/4 LANES WILL BE CLOSED. THE WB I-10 TRANSITION TO THE NB I-5 IS CLOSED. THE I-10 EXPRESS LANES BETWEEN ALAMEDA STREET AND THE I-710 WILL BE CLOSED UNTIL APPROXIMATELY 2 PM DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION - REF LOG 728"
